Jacopo Tintoretto

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Baptism of Christ
by Jacopo Tintoretto
Italy, 16th century · 1580s · oil on canvas
Copy of Tintoretto's Children of Israel Gathering Manna
by Jacopo Tintoretto
Italy, Venice · after 1594 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, with brush and red (chalk?) wash and blue gouache, heightened with white gouache
←Jacopo Robusti, called Tintoretto Tintoretto→
